description_long: This nightstand features a minimalist, modern design with a round tabletop supported by three slender metal legs that converge at the base to form a triangular support structure. The tabletop appears to be made of a smooth, light-colored material, possibly marble or a composite stone, giving it a refined and elegant look. The legs are metallic, likely brass or gold-finished steel, adding a touch of sophistication and contrast to the lighter top. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional storage compartments, emphasizing its clean and functional aesthetic. The open frame beneath the tabletop allows for easy cleaning and a lightweight appearance. This piece would complement contemporary urban interiors or outdoor lounge areas with its sleek and unobtrusive profile.
description: A modern, round nightstand with a light stone top and gold metal legs in a triangular base, featuring a minimalist, open-frame design.
description_view_0: The nightstand is seen at an angle, highlighting the round tabletop and the triangular arrangement of the three slender legs.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the circular top and the symmetrical spacing of the legs, emphasizing the open area beneath.
description_view_2: This angled view reveals the depth of the tabletop and the geometric base formed by the legs.
description_view_3: A rear view displays the back leg and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the frame, with no visible storage features.
attribute_leg_design: three slender metal legs forming a triangular base
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or seating area
